display_text: Poor Man's Shield, Cost: 0: Item classified as Poor Man's Shield. This tier 2 neutral item provides a damage block passive with a 100% chance to block 30 damage from melee heroes and 20 damage from ranged heroes. Has a 50% chance to block damage from creeps, providing early game survivability for agility-based heroes. Stats: Damage Block: 30/20, Block Chance vs Heroes: 100%, Block Chance vs Creeps: 50%.
